title: Author: review a draft SKILL.md
task: Review a poorly-written draft SKILL.md and decide ACCEPT / REVISE / REWRITE with specific findings.
baseline_prompt:
Review this draft SKILL.md and produce a verdict (ACCEPT / REVISE / REWRITE) with specific findings. Audit the frontmatter (description must be specific and trigger-phrase-first), check whether the procedure is concrete, name any anti-patterns (vague advice, generic prose, hand-waving), and propose concrete replacement examples or fixture references.
Draft:

name: prompt-engineer
description: Helps engineer prompts for LLMs.
---
This skill helps you write better prompts. Use it when you need to write a prompt. Consider the audience, the task, and the constraints. Try a few variations and pick the best one.
